heading: Preservation of reports, statements, or documents filed with Clerk of House
label: 5562 Preservation of reports, statements, or documents filed with Clerk of House
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 104c of this titleSection is from the Legislative Branch Appropriations Act, 2005, which is div. G of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2005.

children.text: for a period of 6 years from the date on which the document is filed; or
if the law, rule, or regulation so provides, the period required under such law, rule, or regulation.

children.label: b
children.text: Subsection (a) shall apply with respect to reports, statements, and documents filed before, on, or after .December 8, 2004
